steps.t: Tasâdi usually holds court at the Waterway Market to the south-east of Dâr Laja.
A small knot of people to the south of Tasâdi seem to be discussing what they have heard. You should <rgb=#00FF00>listen</rgb> to their co…
Some folk just past the fountain south of Phârex are discussing the effect a Wizard could have on the political situation of Umbar Baharbêl. You shoul…
Ushrin has his own opinions concerning the effect of a Wizard on these lands.
A small knot of people to the south of Ushrin loudly discuss the rumours concerning a Wizard's powers. You should <rgb=#00FF00>listen</rgb&gt…
Despite the claims of the Umbari that they would know the Wizard when he entered the city, just such a person has already arrived.
